test.observation: All tests passed on dev server. VAL-AWQ-DUAL-001 (numerical equivalence): PASS with max_abs_error < 2.5e-4 for all shapes. VAL-AWQ-DUAL-002 (throughput): PASS with 1.021x-1.051x speedup vs GPTQ dual. Multi-call correctness: PASS. Dispatch tests: PASS (kernel selection, param count verification).

typecheck.observation: Python syntax validation passed for all inference module files.

lint.observation: No lint tool configured in project. Code review found no critical issues.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the persistent buffer + atomic counter protocol used in dual GEMV kernels. This pattern is used consistently across gemv_int4_dual.hip and gemv_int4_dual_awq.hip for race-free multi-tile completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both awq-dual-gemv-kernel and awq-dual-kernel-c-dispatch reviews noted this shared pattern in the kernel implementations.
